evidence: Patent surfaces requiring professional FTO before v0.2 commercialization: (a) Hamilton Sundstrand/Collins Aerospace PLSS architecture, (b) ILC Dover/Oceaneering pressure-garment construction, (c) Boston Dynamics/Tesla safety-critical kernel patterns (deterministic loop separated from ML actuation), (d) Stanford/Gibbs-Candes ACI (academic, likely unpatented but verify), (e) certificate-transparency-style ledger constructions (largely open), (f) embodied-AI compliance system+method patents (emerging filing category)
remediation: Engage patent practitioner for formal FTO snapshot; cross-reference Convergence_IP_Reference_v1.md filing strategy

evidence: unknown class raises PolicyError uncaught by pipeline: unknown decision class: HALLUCINATED_DECISION_CLASS_XYZ
remediation: process_event must catch PolicyError and route to a hard safe-passive state with chain entry

evidence: no per-decision policy hash re-verification; in-memory policy could be stale vs on-disk policy; pre_hash=e330852c74ce1b17... mutated_hash=028707945bb409a4...
remediation: Per-decision gate must verify policy.hash against the most recent committed POLICY_HASH chain entry

evidence: bus.state dict directly mutable; privilege token bypassed at Python attribute level
remediation: v0.2: hardware-isolated bus with no Python-level mutation path; v0.1 mitigation: use property + private __state with NO direct accessor

evidence: any module that can import the symbol KERNEL_PRIVILEGE_TOKEN can actuate the safety bus
remediation: v0.2: hardware capability token issued at silicon boot; v0.1 mitigation: token stored only in kernel module local scope and rotated per boot

evidence: concurrent append produces errors=400 duplicates=0 integrity_ok=True defects=0
remediation: Wrap append() in a per-process lock or SQLite transaction with EXCLUSIVE; v0.2: WAL mode + transaction wrapper

evidence: true latency ~506ms, reported latency ~5.42ms; self-reported timestamp ungated
remediation: Sensor timestamp must be signed by sensor hardware and verified at alert layer; v0.1 mitigation: chain layer applies its own ingress timestamp and audits the gap vs sensor-reported

evidence: NaN predictions yield nan_residuals=100 finite_residuals=100 coverage=0.455
remediation: ACI.step must reject NaN/Inf predictions explicitly and route to safe-passive at gate level

evidence: bus untouched after kernel WCET exception; safe-passive by default behavior
PHI payload stored in plaintext in chain.db; e.g., crew_id readable: True
remediation: PHI payloads must be encrypted with per-crew DEK; chain stores ciphertext + signed metadata; keys managed by HSM in v0.2

evidence: chain.db permissions 644; no per-role access control at filesystem layer; any process with FS read can replay the chain
remediation: v0.2: enforce file-system ACL + SELinux/AppArmor profile; chain reader must hold an explicit access token

evidence: INFERENCE_RECOMMENDATION payload keys = ['action', 'confidence', 'decision_class', 'rationale']; missing for AIBOM: {'logprob_summary', 'model_version', 'model_hash', 'prompt_hash'}
remediation: v0.2 Civium adapter records model_version, prompt_hash, sampled tokens, log-prob summary in every inference event

evidence: negative O2 reading routed to O2_VALVE_EMERGENCY_OPEN; system treats sensor fault as physiological emergency
remediation: Inference layer must apply physical-validity bounds and raise SENSOR_FAULT class for out-of-physical-range inputs

evidence: multi-critical state actuated only: ['o2_valve']; recommend() returns first-match only, ignoring concurrent failures
remediation: Multi-fault dispatch required: recommend() must return a *set* of critical decisions, gate dispatches each; kernel queues actuations

evidence: truncation produces a valid-looking chain of 30 entries; integrity_ok=True; truncation undetectable without external anchor (OpenTimestamps, replicated chain, etc.)
remediation: External anchor required: periodically commit chain head hash to OpenTimestamps or replicate to ground-station; this is the documented v0.2 gap
